latin: Exemplar vestimentorum, in speculum intuens, graviter dixit: 'vere, vere ridicule formosus sum.' quod solum omnibus problematis in mundo solvere non poterat eum perturbabat.

questions.prompt: What is the model's defining characteristic?

questions.target: That being handsome can't solve every world problem
choices: That being handsome can't solve every world problem

translation: The clothing model, looking into the mirror, said gravely: 'I am truly, truly ridiculously good-looking.' The only thing that troubled him was that this could not solve all the world's problems.
